description_long: This is a single cupcake with a swirl of white icing, generously topped with gold and white spherical and star-shaped sprinkles. A prominent gold candle shaped like a rifle is inserted into the center, with a realistic flame at the top. The front features a large, round medallion with a blue and gold design, displaying a chicken silhouette and the text 'GLOBAL OFFENSIVE 2012-2022.' The cupcake liner is dark blue with gold decorative patterns, adding a celebratory touch. The icing appears glossy and thick, with the decorations giving it a festive, themed appearance. The overall look is playful and commemorative, likely referencing a gaming or pop culture event.
description: A decorated cupcake with white icing, gold and white sprinkles, a gold rifle-shaped candle, and a blue medallion with a chicken motif.
description_view_0: The cupcake is seen from a side angle, highlighting the gold rifle candle and the swirl of white icing with gold and white sprinkles.
description_view_1: The front view displays the blue and gold medallion with the chicken and 'GLOBAL OFFENSIVE 2012-2022' text, as well as the rifle candle and detailed icing.
description_view_2: This side view shows the medallion edge-on, emphasizing the swirl of icing and the candle, with sprinkles visible throughout.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the silhouette of the rifle candle and the medallion, with the swirl of icing and sprinkles continuing around the cupcake.
